comparison_surface_note: Compares official Play clientbound set_default_spawn_position framed packet id and default RespawnData body by splitting the generated frame and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Play, Direction::Clientbound, official packet id, official body)
internal_owner.scope_note: Current implementation witness for Play clientbound set_default_spawn_position default framed dispatch/decode; not respawn runtime behavior.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Play clientbound set_default_spawn_position packet framing and dispatch/decode for LevelData.RespawnData.DEFAULT only; it does not prove respawn, compass, world, or player state behavior.
